title: Universal Mod Localizer
description: Provide support for mods that are not supported by i18n update mod.
body:
Similar to automatic localization updates, it provides support for mods that are not supported by automatic localization updates. As mods use embedded resource packages instead of automatically downloading them, automatic updates cannot be achieved.

If you want to translate a mod, please leave a message in the short review section.

This mod does not require Fabric API/Quilted Fabric API/Quilt Standard Libraries.

Dev version dowload link:[https://gitee.com/kongzhongtitian/network/blob/master/Universal%20Mod%20Localizer.md](https://gitee.com/kongzhongtitian/network/blob/master/Universal%20Mod%20Localizer.md)

Note: Forge 1.13.2-1.17.1 is not supported.
